title: A Strange Kingdom in Elbaf
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Nami, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy, Usopp as The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.
scene: The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was a while after we left you guys at water 7!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We couldn't wait to see the captains again, so we went to little garden ourselves!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyone'd be curious after 100 years!! Daha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You think a punch is enough to take down these stubborn oafs?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dapa PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA! That's a real problem...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...When you're in a duel to the death!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In the end, they got us...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...to go back to Elbaf with them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We had to arm ourselves again!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When we got there, these two were still going at it bare- handed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sometimes weapons just break! Gegya Gya Gya Gya Gya!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: C'mon, Nami! Didn't you learn a thing back on little garden?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Careful, there's a chance, it'll make you hallucinate!! Gya GA GA GA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We finally got to reach it together!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...here at Gartel Island in the new world--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A blatant affront to the Emperor.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...rely on my flag. If I just let this slide, people would lose faith in it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and my friends and allies would become targets.

summary: This part advances the Arrival in Elbaf through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
